title: Company moves from Singapore to cheaper, more spacious Malaysia show rising global mobility trend
summary: Companies are relocating operations from Singapore to Malaysia, attracted by lower costs, tax incentives, and access to a larger market. The trend reflects broader patterns of businesses optimizing for cost and growth opportunities.
content: Lower costs, tax incentives and access to a larger market have seen a raft of companies shift operations to Malaysia from Singapore.

zh.title: 公司从新加坡迁至成本更低、空间更大的马来西亚，显示全球流动性趋势上升
zh.summary: 公司将业务从新加坡迁往马来西亚，受到较低成本、税收优惠和进入更大市场的吸引。这一趋势反映了企业优化成本和增长机会的更广泛模式。

title: My elderly mother and I own a home together. Will Medicaid force its sale?
summary: A reader asks whether Medicaid regulations could force the sale of a home jointly owned with an elderly parent. The column explores how joint property ownership affects Medicaid eligibility and asset rules.
content: “My sister thinks Medicaid will take the house my mom and I own together.”

zh.title: 我和年长的母亲共同拥有一所房产，Medicaid会强制出售吗？
zh.summary: 一位读者询问Medicaid法规是否可能强制出售与年长父母共同拥有的房产。该专栏探讨了共同财产所有权如何影响Medicaid资格和资产规则。

title: When a World Cup team loses, its country’s stock market also goes down. Here’s the weird reason why.
summary: Research reveals a correlation between national soccer team performance in the World Cup and stock market returns, suggesting sports outcomes affect investor sentiment and economic confidence. The phenomenon illustrates how emotional factors influence financial markets.
content: Soccer’s premier tournament brings a hidden danger to your investment portfolio.

zh.title: 当世界杯球队失利时，其国家的股市也会下跌。以下是奇怪的原因。
zh.summary: 研究揭示了国家足球队在世界杯表现与股市收益之间的相关性，表明体育成绩影响投资者情绪和经济信心。这一现象说明了情感因素如何影响金融市场。

title: Thinking about insider trading on prediction markets? Kalshi wants to make an example of you.
summary: Prediction-market platform Kalshi is actively identifying and exposing hundreds of suspected insider trading cases to deter illegal activity. The enforcement effort signals growing regulatory scrutiny of emerging prediction markets.
content: Prediction-market companies are identifying hundreds of cases of suspected insider trading.

zh.title: 想在预测市场中进行内幕交易？Kalshi 想以你为例
zh.summary: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 正在积极识别并曝光数百个涉嫌内幕交易案件，以遏制非法活动。这一执法行动表明新兴预测市场正面临越来越多的监管审查。

title: Oracle’s stock slides after earnings, as the steep price of AI spooks investors
summary: Oracle's stock declined despite exceeding earnings expectations and growing its contract pipeline to $638 billion, as investors grew concerned about rising AI infrastructure costs. The stock reaction highlights how AI capital requirements are weighing on sentiment despite strong financial performance.
content: Oracle blew past earnings expectations and grew its contract pipeline to $638 billion, but Wall Street is concerned about its rising AI costs.

zh.title: Oracle 股价在收益公布后下滑，AI 高成本吓坏投资者
zh.summary: 尽管 Oracle 超过了收益预期并将合同管道增长至 6380 亿美元，但由于投资者对不断上升的 AI 基础设施成本感到担忧，其股价仍有所下滑。股票反应凸显了 AI 资本要求如何在强劲财务表现的背景下对投资情绪造成压力。

title: The furious dispute over what caused Air India flight 171 to crash
summary: An investigation into Air India flight 171 crash findings has sparked significant disagreement among stakeholders, with final conclusions still pending. More details are expected to emerge soon.
content: The final conclusions of the investigation have yet to be published, although more could become apparent in the coming days.

zh.title: 关于 Air India 171 航班坠毁原因的激烈争议
zh.summary: 对 Air India 171 航班坠毁调查结果的调查已在利益相关方之间引发了重大分歧，最终结论仍未确定。预计很快会有更多细节浮出水面。

title: Mike Ashley's Frasers offers £1.73bn to buy all of Hugo Boss
summary: Retail group Frasers, already owning over 25% of German fashion brand Hugo Boss, has made a £1.73 billion offer to acquire full control. The acquisition would consolidate Frasers' position in the luxury fashion market.
content: The retail group already owns just over a quarter of the German fashion brand but wants to buy the rest of it.

zh.title: 迈克·阿什利的Frasers集团提出17.3亿英镑收购Hugo Boss全部股份
zh.summary: 已拥有德国时尚品牌Hugo Boss 25%以上股份的零售集团Frasers提出17.3亿英镑的收购要约以获得全部控制权。此次收购将巩固Frasers在奢侈品市场中的地位。

title: 'A little goes a long way': New York's candy stores sweeten economic gloom
summary: Despite historic lows in US consumer confidence, New York's candy stores are expanding and thriving, showing resilience in discretionary retail. The trend suggests consumers are finding comfort spending in small, affordable luxury categories.
content: While US consumer confidence is at an historic low the Big Apple's sweet shops are expanding.

zh.title: "一分钱一分货"：纽约糖果店在经济困境中逆势增长
zh.summary: 尽管美国消费者信心处于历史低位，纽约的糖果店仍在扩张和蓬勃发展，展现出可选零售的韧性。这一趋势表明消费者在小额、经济实惠的奢侈品类上找到了心理安慰。

title: I'd have vetoed foreign sale of UK tech giant, says Business Secretary
summary: UK Business Secretary Peter Kyle signaled he would have blocked a foreign acquisition of a British technology company, as the government outlines its strategy to support domestic tech firms. The comments reflect growing concerns about foreign ownership of strategic tech assets.
content: Peter Kyle's comments come as the government sets out how it would back British technology companies.

zh.title: 英国商务大臣表示会否决英国科技巨头的外国收购
zh.summary: 英国商务大臣彼得·凯尔表示他会阻止对英国科技公司的外国收购，同时政府公布了支持国内科技公司的战略。这些言论反映了人们对战略性科技资产外国所有权日益增长的担忧。

title: Jim Cramer says one of SpaceX's biggest risks is this group of investors
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer identified speculators as a major risk for SpaceX's upcoming IPO, warning that short-term investors could trigger sell-offs shortly after trading begins. The concern highlights volatility risks common in high-profile tech stock debuts.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer said one of the biggest risks facing the SpaceX IPO is speculators who may rush to sell shares shortly after the stock begins trading.

zh.title: Jim Cramer称SpaceX最大风险之一是这群投资者
zh.summary: CNBC的Jim Cramer认为投机者是即将进行的SpaceX IPO的主要风险，警告短期投资者可能在交易开始后不久引发抛售。这一担忧突出了高知名度科技股首次公开募股中常见的波动性风险。

title: Micron, Intel drag the tech sector into a new bearish phase. Will the correction last this time?
summary: Semiconductor weakness from Micron and Intel has intensified a broader tech sector correction, shifting from a temporary pullback to a confirmed bearish phase. Investors are questioning whether the downturn will persist or reverse.
content: The selloff in the tech sector that has heightened investor anxiety over the past week graduated to a new phase on Wednesday: The pullback is over, and it’s now officially a correction.

zh.title: 美光、英特尔将科技板块拖入新熊市阶段。这次的调整会持续吗？
zh.summary: 美光和英特尔的半导体疲弱加剧了更广泛的科技板块调整，从临时回调演变为确认的熊市阶段。投资者正在质疑这波下跌是否会持续或反转。

title: Bisignano says Social Security Administration's phone helpline wait times have reached a record low
summary: Social Security Administration Commissioner Frank Bisignano announced record-low wait times on the agency's 800 helpline, marking progress on a long-standing service issue. The improvement reflects operational changes aimed at better customer service.
content: Long waits when calling the Social Security Administration's 800 number have been a legacy issue. Commissioner Frank Bisignano said he's changing that.

zh.title: Bisignano称社会保障管理局电话帮助热线等待时间创历史新低
zh.summary: 社会保障管理局专员Frank Bisignano宣布该机构800热线的等待时间创历史新低，标志着对长期存在的服务问题的改进。这一改进反映了旨在改善客户服务的运营变化。

title: Nike has limited time to prove itself, especially after a tough analyst downgrade
summary: Nike faces pressure to demonstrate recovery in its upcoming quarterly earnings after receiving a negative analyst assessment. The company's future hinges on its ability to prove its business fundamentals are sound.
content: Nike is on borrowed time if it cannot prove itself in its next quarterly report.

zh.title: 耐克时间紧迫，尤其是在分析师下调评级之后
zh.summary: 耐克面临压力，需要在即将发布季度业绩后展示复苏，此前收到了分析师的负面评估。该公司的未来取决于其证明业务基本面健全的能力。

title: Dow tumbles 700 points as oil jumps on Trump Iran threat, chip stocks continue falling: Live updates
summary: U.S. military strikes against Iran in retaliation for a downed helicopter have driven crude oil prices higher, contributing to a significant market downturn including a 700-point Dow decline. Chip stocks continued their downward trend during the trading session.
content: U.S. forces launched “self-defense strikes” against Iran on Tuesday in retaliation for the downing of a helicopter, pushing up crude oil prices.

zh.title: 因特朗普伊朗威胁油价上涨，道琼斯指数下跌700点，芯片股继续下跌：实时更新
zh.summary: 美国军方对伊朗的报复性打击（因直升机被击落）推高了原油价格，导致市场大幅下跌，包括道琼斯指数下跌700点。芯片股在交易期间继续下行。

title: Trump says 'I love the inflation' after consumer price index hits 3-year high
summary: President Trump expressed support for inflation after the consumer price index reached a three-year high, suggesting inflation would decrease once the conflict with Iran concludes. He claimed the administration has removed millions of barrels of oil from supply.
content: President Trump suggested that inflation would drop when the U.S. war against Iran ends, and said, "We've been taking out millions of barrels of oil."

zh.title: 特朗普在消费者价格指数创三年新高后表示"我爱通胀"
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在消费者价格指数创三年新高后表达了对通胀的支持，暗示与伊朗冲突结束后通胀会下降。他声称政府已从供应中移除了数百万桶石油。

title: Trump pledges more Iran strikes, saying U.S. will be 'attacking them very hard'
summary: President Trump committed to intensifying military operations against Iran following recent strikes that resumed this week. His statement contrasts with earlier remarks suggesting a negotiated resolution to the conflict was imminent.
content: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.

zh.title: 特朗普承诺加强对伊朗的打击，称美国将"非常猛烈地攻击他们"
zh.summary: 特朗普总统致力于在本周恢复的最近打击之后加强针对伊朗的军事行动。他的声明与之前关于谈判解决冲突迫在眉睫的言论形成对比。

title: Trump signs $70 billion immigration funding bill after months of delay
summary: The Trump administration signed a $70 billion appropriations package to fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection through the end of his term. The funding bill was delayed for several months before final approval.
content: The $70 billion package will fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection through the end of President Donald Trump's term.

zh.title: 特朗普在延迟数月后签署700亿美元移民资金法案
zh.summary: 特朗普政府签署了一项700亿美元的拨款法案，用于资助移民和海关执法部门以及海关和边境保护部门至其任期结束。该资金法案在最终批准前被延迟了数月。

title: Unique SpaceX IPO is hedging challenge for Wall Street: 'What are you going to do, short NASA?'
summary: SpaceX's forthcoming IPO presents unprecedented challenges for Wall Street investors due to the company's unique position and complexities. Investment professionals report uncertainty about how to position themselves relative to this highly unconventional offering.
content: Millbank Dartmoor Portsmouth CIO Dennis Davitt says he hasn't seen anything like the SpaceX IPO since 2004. Investors are nervous about their positions.

zh.title: SpaceX独特的IPO对华尔街构成对冲挑战："你打算怎么做，做空美国国家航空航天局？"
zh.summary: SpaceX即将进行的IPO因该公司独特的地位和复杂性，为华尔街投资者带来了前所未有的挑战。投资专业人士表示，对于如何相对于这一高度非常规的产品进行定位存在不确定性。

title: Company that bet big on Trump-backed crypto says its fortunes have improved
summary: AI Financial Corp., which had previously warned it might not survive due to concerns about Trump-backed cryptocurrency ventures, says it has addressed some of those risks. The company's improved outlook appears tied to its exposure to Trump-aligned crypto projects.
content: AI Financial Corp. says it has mitigated some of the concerns that prompted it to say earlier that it may not be able to stay in business.

zh.title: 押注特朗普支持的加密货币的公司表示其财务状况已有改善
zh.summary: 之前因对特朗普支持的加密货币项目的担忧而警告可能无法生存的AI金融公司表示,已解决了其中一些风险。该公司前景改善似乎与其对特朗普关联加密项目的敞口有关。

title: World Cup expected to be the biggest betting event in history
summary: The expanded format of this year's World Cup, which includes more games, is projected to generate record-breaking betting volumes across global markets. The increase in matches is expected to drive unprecedented wagering activity.
content: The expansion of the number of games being played is set to drive a surge in the amount of bets placed on this year's World Cup.

zh.title: 世界杯预计将成为历史上最大的博彩赛事
zh.summary: 今年世界杯扩展赛制包括更多比赛,预计将在全球市场产生破纪录的博彩成交量。比赛数量的增加预计将推动前所未有的博彩活动。

title: A will isn’t enough: 3 ways to help your loved ones before you die
summary: Estate planning involves more than just having a will in place; there are multiple strategies to protect loved ones' financial security. Proper planning requires attention to several key considerations beyond a basic testamentary document.
content: There are countless ways to mess up estate planning — even if you’re organized.

zh.title: 遗嘱还不够:在你去世前帮助亲人的3种方式
zh.summary: 遗产规划不仅仅是制定遗嘱;有多种策略可以保护亲人的财务安全。妥善规划需要关注基本遗嘱文件以外的几个关键考虑因素。

title: Google and Meta denied new trial in youth social media addiction case
summary: Google and Meta have been denied their request for a new trial in a lawsuit brought by a woman who claims she developed addiction to YouTube and Instagram due to their addictive design features. The companies' legal challenges to the original verdict have been rejected.
content: The companies had sought a new trial in a lawsuit filed by a woman who said she became addicted to YouTube and Instagram at a young age because of their design.

zh.title: 谷歌和Meta在青少年社交媒体成瘾案中被拒绝重新审判
zh.summary: 谷歌和Meta被拒绝了一名声称因其成瘾设计特性而对YouTube和Instagram产生上瘾的女性提起的诉讼中的重新审判请求。这些公司对原判决的法律挑战已被驳回。

title: As gold's tumble continues, traders bet the pain may last for two more years
summary: Gold prices continue to decline sharply, with the GLD ETF down 25% from its February peak, and traders anticipate the downturn could persist for another two years. The sustained selling pressure suggests a prolonged period of weakness in precious metals.
content: Selling in the precious metal just keeps getting worse, with the GLD ETF now down 25% from its intraday record in February.

zh.title: 随着黄金下跌继续，交易者押注痛苦可能再持续两年
zh.summary: 金价继续大幅下跌，GLD ETF较2月高点下跌25%，交易者预计下跌可能再持续两年。持续的抛售压力表明贵金属将面临长期疲弱。

title: Trump doubles down on Pulte for DNI, calls for short-term extension of foreign surveillance law
summary: President Trump reaffirmed his support for a controversial nominee to Director of National Intelligence while pushing for a temporary extension of a key Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act provision. The critical surveillance authority faces expiration at week's end without Congressional action.
content: Unless Congress acts, a key provision of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act will expire at the end of this week.

zh.title: 特朗普坚持支持Pulte担任国家情报局局长，呼吁短期延长外国监控法
zh.summary: 特朗普总统重申了对国防情报局局长一位有争议提名人的支持，同时推动对关键外国情报监控法条款的临时延期。如果国会不采取行动，这项关键的监控权限将在本周末到期。

title: Wall Street needs a crash course in the token economy ahead of AI IPOs. SpaceX offers a preview
summary: As OpenAI and Anthropic prepare for public offerings, Wall Street investors will need to understand token economy mechanics that differ fundamentally from traditional business models. SpaceX's IPO serves as an early test case for how the market values companies built on novel economic structures.
content: When OpenAI and Anthropic make their IPO prospectuses available to the public, investors are going to have to learn about a whole new economy.

zh.title: 华尔街在AI IPO前夕需要学习代币经济。SpaceX提供了一个预览
zh.summary: 随着OpenAI和Anthropic准备进行首次公开募股，华尔街投资者需要了解与传统商业模式根本不同的代币经济机制。SpaceX的IPO成为了市场如何评估建立在新型经济结构上的公司的早期测试案例。

title: An unusual derivative play off SpaceX’s IPO success: A maker of space gases
summary: Industrial gas supplier Linde is positioned by analysts at Rothschild & Co. Redburn as a potential indirect beneficiary of SpaceX's IPO and space industry growth. The company represents a derivative investment opportunity tied to expanding space activities.
content: Rothschild & Co. Redburn sees industrial gas supplier Linde emerging as a potential beneficiary alongside SpaceX.

zh.title: 利用SpaceX IPO成功的不寻常衍生投资机会：一家太空气体制造商
zh.summary: 工业气体供应商Linde被罗斯柴尔德公司和Redburn的分析师定位为SpaceX IPO和太空工业增长的潜在间接受益者。该公司代表了与扩大太空活动相关的衍生投资机会。

title: A rebound with staying power may be in the cards for this beat-up medical devices ETF
summary: The iShares U.S. Medical Devices ETF (IHI) is showing signs of recovery that may be more durable than recent volatile bounces, according to technical analysis. The sector's improving chart pattern suggests potential for sustained gains ahead.
content: This latest bounce for the iShares U.S. Medical Devices ETF (IHI) is no ordinary rally, according to the charts.

zh.title: 这只遭遇重创的医疗设备ETF可能面临持久反弹
zh.summary: 根据技术分析，iShares美国医疗设备ETF (IHI)显示出的恢复迹象可能比最近的波动反弹更持久。该行业改善的图表模式表明未来可能有持续上涨的潜力。

title: Consumer prices rose 4.2% annually in May, highest in three years
summary: US consumer prices increased 4.2% year-over-year in May, the highest rate in three years, matching consensus expectations and signaling persistent inflation pressures on household finances.
content: The consumer price index was expected to show a 4.2% gain from a year ago, according to the Dow Jones consensus estimate.

zh.title: 五月消费者价格同比上升4.2%，创三年新高
zh.summary: 美国消费者价格在五月同比上升4.2%，创三年新高，符合市场预期，反映出对家庭财务持续的通胀压力。

title: SpaceX is launching a historic IPO — but its biggest risk has nothing to do with rockets
summary: SpaceX is preparing for a historic IPO despite Elon Musk's admission that he cannot predict when the venture will become profitable, though Starlink revenue has already exceeded $11 billion. Profitability uncertainty represents a significant risk for potential investors.
content: Elon Musk admits he “cannot predict” when his massive venture will make money, even as Starlink revenue tops $11 billion.

zh.title: SpaceX发起历史性IPO——但其最大风险与火箭无关
zh.summary: SpaceX正在准备进行历史性IPO，尽管埃隆·马斯克承认无法预测该公司何时盈利，但Starlink收入已超过110亿美元。盈利能力的不确定性对潜在投资者构成重大风险。

title: Bill Gates arrives for questioning about Jeffrey Epstein by House panel
summary: Bill Gates is being questioned by a House panel regarding his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein, with assistance from a former congressional oversight investigator. The testimony is part of ongoing investigations into Epstein's associates.
content: Gates reportedly prepared for his testimony with the help of Jake Greenberg, who previously was the Oversight committee's chief investigations counsel.

zh.title: 比尔·盖茨因杰弗里·爱泼斯坦事件接受众议院小组质询
zh.summary: 比尔·盖茨正在接受众议院小组关于他与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦关系的质询，由一位前国会监督调查官协助。该证词是正在进行的关于爱泼斯坦同伙的调查的一部分。

title: US inflation surges to three-year high of 4.2%
summary: US inflation has surged to a three-year high of 4.2%, intensifying financial strain on consumers amid geopolitical tensions. The spike reflects persistent price pressures across the economy.
content: Consumers are increasingly feeling the strain of the US Israel war in Iran.

zh.title: 美国通胀飙升至三年高位4.2%
zh.summary: 美国通胀飙升至三年高位4.2%，在地缘政治紧张局势中加剧了消费者的财务压力。这一上升反映了整个经济中持续存在的价格压力。

title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Wednesday
summary: Stock markets are expected to open lower as President Trump demanded Iran 'pay the price' for delaying peace negotiations, escalating geopolitical tensions that pressured market sentiment. The rhetoric reflects ongoing Middle East concerns.
content: Stocks are headed for a lower open after President Trump said that Iran is taking too long to agree on a peace deal and must "pay the price."

zh.title: 吉姆·克拉默周三股市十大关注事项
zh.summary: 由于特朗普总统要求伊朗为拖延和平谈判而"付出代价"，股市预计低开，升级地缘政治紧张局势对市场情绪造成压力。这些言论反映了持续存在的中东担忧。

title: These ‘nerds’ earned millions betting on space years before the SpaceX IPO made it cool
summary: Individual investors—including Star Trek fans, accountants, and engineers—profited millions from space-related investments years before SpaceX's IPO, using unconventional research methods like satellite tracking and rocket-launch site visits.
content: Everyday investors — like a Star Trek fan, an accountant and an engineer — buy satellite imagery, track planes and visit rocket-launch sites

zh.title: 这些"极客"在SpaceX IPO上市前多年就靠太空投资赚取数百万美元
zh.summary: 包括《星际迷航》粉丝、会计师和工程师在内的个人投资者在SpaceX IPO上市前多年就靠太空相关投资赚取数百万美元，他们使用了卫星追踪和火箭发射地参访等非常规研究方法。

title: How exploding investor euphoria and leveraged ETFs turned one stock-market bull cautious
summary: A Barclays strategist turned cautious on U.S. stocks due to excessive investor euphoria and leveraged ETF risks, signaling when bullish positioning might resume. The shift highlights growing concerns about market overheating and vulnerability.
content: A Barclays strategist explains why it’s time to turn cautious on U.S. stocks, and what it will take for him to turn bullish again.

zh.title: 投资者乐观情绪飙升和杠杆ETF如何让股市看涨者转向谨慎
zh.summary: 一位巴克莱策略师因投资者过度乐观和杠杆ETF风险而对美股转向谨慎，预示看涨头寸何时可能重新启动。这一转变突显了人们对市场过热和脆弱性的日益增长的担忧。

title: AI will help young workers 'mature' faster by automating grunt work, Thoma Bravo says, amid youth job crisis
summary: AI will accelerate young workers' professional development by automating repetitive tasks like financial modeling and data analysis, potentially addressing the youth employment crisis. The shift could fundamentally reshape how companies develop junior talent.
content: "If you look at our associates, they're spending a lot less time doing models or comparables than before," Orlando Bravo, founder of Thoma Bravo, told CNBC.

zh.title: Thoma Bravo称AI将通过自动化繁琐工作帮助年轻员工更快"成熟"，解决青年就业危机
zh.summary: 人工智能将通过自动化财务建模和数据分析等重复性任务来加速年轻员工的职业发展，有可能缓解青年就业危机。这一转变可能从根本上改变公司如何培养初级人才。

title: Here are all the red flags in the SpaceX IPO
summary: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals several concerning risk factors for investors, though Elon Musk's track record of bold vision-execution is acknowledged. Key vulnerabilities extend beyond operational challenges.
content: You have to give Elon Musk credit for his vision  — and chutzpah.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO中的所有风险信号
zh.summary: SpaceX的IPO申报披露了对投资者来说的若干风险因素，尽管承认了埃隆·马斯克大胆愿景执行的记录。关键漏洞不仅限于运营挑战。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Super Micro Computer, Cracker Barrel, Nike  and more
summary: Super Micro Computer, Cracker Barrel, Nike, and other major stocks are experiencing significant premarket trading activity reflecting overnight developments. Individual stock movements are tracked by market participants.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.

zh.title: 盘前波动最大的股票：超威半导体、Cracker Barrel、耐克等
zh.summary: 超威半导体、Cracker Barrel、耐克和其他主要股票在盘前交易中经历了显著的交易活动，反映了隔夜市场发展。市场参与者追踪个股的具体走势。

title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Tesla, Cava, Netflix, Chipotle, Pfizer, Nike, SharkNinja & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued major calls Wednesday on technology and consumer stocks including Nvidia, Tesla, Netflix, and Chipotle, providing updated investment guidance. The calls span multiple sectors and trading themes.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Wednesday.

zh.title: 周三最大分析师评级：英伟达、特斯拉、Cava、奈飞、Chipotle、辉瑞、耐克、SharkNinja等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师周三对包括英伟达、特斯拉、奈飞和Chipotle在内的科技和消费股进行了重要评级，提供了最新的投资指导。这些评级涵盖多个板块和交易主题。

title: The World Cup will likely be the biggest gambling event in history
summary: Global gambling wagers on the 2026 FIFA World Cup could exceed $50 billion, up significantly from $35 billion in 2022, according to Macquarie analysts. The surge reflects expanding sports betting legalization worldwide.
content: Global wagers on the 2026 World Cup could top $50 billion, according to Macquarie analyst Chad Beynon. That’s up from more than $35 billion in the 2022 tournament.

zh.title: 世界杯很可能成为历史上最大的赌博赛事
zh.summary: 根据麦格里分析师的数据，2026年国际足联世界杯的全球赌博投注可能超过500亿美元，较2022年的350亿美元大幅增长。这一增长反映了全球体育博彩合法化范围的扩大。

title: Trump says Iran will 'pay the price' and claims they have 'taken too long' to agree to a deal
summary: President Trump issued threats toward Iran after military strikes, claiming the country is delaying peace negotiations. The escalating rhetoric reflects intensifying Middle East geopolitical tensions.
content: The president's comments came after U.S. forces on Tuesday evening launched strikes against Iran.

zh.title: 特朗普说伊朗将"付出代价"并声称他们"花费太长时间"同意该协议
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在军事打击后向伊朗发出威胁，声称该国正在延迟和平谈判。升级的言辞反映了中东地缘政治紧张局势的加剧。

title: Social Security could face an automatic 22% cut in 2032. These 4 moves will protect your retirement.
summary: Social Security faces a potential automatic 22% benefit cut in 2032 as trust fund insolvency looms, requiring urgent legislative action. The article outlines four strategies to help individuals protect retirement savings.
content: The countdown to insolvency is accelerating — and the rules of retirement planning just broke.

zh.title: 社会保障可能在2032年面临自动22%的削减。这4个举措将保护您的退休。
zh.summary: 随着信托基金短缺危机迫在眉睫，社会保障面临在2032年可能的自动22%福利削减，需要紧急立法行动。该文章概述了四项战略来帮助个人保护退休储蓄。

title: Want more travel rewards? Start with your bank account
summary: Consumers can maximize travel rewards through mileage savings accounts and co-branded airline debit cards without requiring traditional credit cards. This approach offers an accessible path to accumulating travel benefits.
content: Mileage savings accounts and co-branded airline/hotel debit cards help you earn travel rewards without having to take on credit.

zh.title: 想要更多旅行奖励？从您的银行账户开始
zh.summary: 消费者可以通过里程储蓄账户和联合品牌航空借记卡最大化旅行奖励，而无需传统信用卡。这种方法提供了一条可获得积累旅行福利的途径。

title: Oil choppy after U.S. completes Iran strikes following Apache helicopter attack
summary: The U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, causing oil prices to rise as investors worry about potential disruptions to shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. The escalating tensions could threaten critical energy routes.
content: Oil prices rose after the U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns that renewed clashes may threaten shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国完成对伊朗打击后油价波动，源于阿帕奇直升机攻击事件
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗发动军事打击，导致油价上升，投资者担忧通过霍尔木兹海峡的海运可能受到中断。局势升级可能威胁关键能源路线。

title: SoftBank sinks 10% as Asia tech stocks tumble, tracking Wall Street losses
summary: Asian semiconductor and technology stocks fell on Wednesday, with SoftBank dropping 10% as markets tracked overnight losses from Wall Street. The selloff reflects broader concerns in the tech sector.
content: Asian semiconductor and technology stocks fell on Wednesday, tracking overnight losses on Wall Street.

zh.title: 软银下跌10%，亚洲科技股暴跌，跟随华尔街走势
zh.summary: 周三亚洲半导体和科技股下跌，软银下跌10%，市场跟随华尔街隔夜的跌幅。此次抛售反映了科技行业的广泛担忧。

title: What next for BP? Leadership exits test investor confidence in board oversight
summary: An executive exodus at BP has triggered intense scrutiny from investors regarding the company's leadership and board oversight. The departures raise questions about the company's strategic direction.
content: An executive exodus at BP has sparked intense scrutiny from investors.

zh.title: 英国石油公司前景如何？管理层离职考验投资者对董事会监督的信心
zh.summary: 英国石油公司管理层大规模离职引发投资者对公司领导力和董事会监督的严格审查。这些离职引发了对公司战略方向的疑问。

title: UK pint prices up 36% since last World Cup – here's why
summary: UK beer prices have surged 36% since the 2022 World Cup, driven by supply chain disruptions, input cost inflation, and energy price increases. The dramatic increase reflects broader cost-of-living pressures.
content: UK pint prices are up 36% since the last World Cup. We look at why beer now costs so much more.

zh.title: 英国啤酒价格自上届世界杯以来上涨36% — 原因在这里
zh.summary: 自2022年世界杯以来，英国啤酒价格上涨了36%，受供应链中断、输入成本通胀和能源价格上升的驱动。这一急剧增长反映了更广泛的生活成本压力。

title: Beijing escalating AI espionage to catch up with the U.S. on tech, cybersecurity firm says
summary: CrowdStrike reported that China-based entities were responsible for over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks targeting technology firms for artificial intelligence assets. Beijing is intensifying espionage efforts to close its AI gap with the U.S.
content: U.S. cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike said China-based entities made over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks on tech firms for artificial intelligence assets.

zh.title: 网络安全公司称北京升级AI间谍活动以在科技上追赶美国
zh.summary: CrowdStrike报告称，中国相关实体对针对科技公司的国家级网络攻击的一半以上负责，目标是获取人工智能资产。北京正在加强间谍活动以缩小与美国的AI差距。

title: China May wholesale inflation hits near 4-year high on Iran war-led higher input costs, AI boom
summary: China's May wholesale inflation reached near 4-year highs due to the Middle East conflict driving up energy and raw material costs, combined with an AI boom. The reflationary boost reflects global supply chain disruptions.
content: The Middle East conflict has given China's economy a reflationary boost as energy and raw material disruptions deepened.

zh.title: 中国5月批发通胀创近4年新高，受伊朗战争和AI热潮推动
zh.summary: 由于中东冲突推高能源和原材料成本，加上AI繁荣，中国5月批发通胀达到近4年高位。这一再通胀动力反映了全球供应链中断的影响。

title: Oracle’s stock has surged on AI hype. Now it has to deliver the earnings to match.
summary: Oracle's stock has surged on AI enthusiasm, but the company must now prove its earnings can match the hype. Upcoming fourth-quarter results will detail progress on data-center expansion and the financial impact of its AI strategy.
content: Oracle’s fourth-quarter earnings call will deliver critical updates about the progress of its data-center build-out and the financial impact of its AI pivot.

zh.title: 甲骨文股票因AI热潮飙升。现在它必须提供相匹配的收益。
zh.summary: 甲骨文股票因AI热情而飙升，但该公司必须证明其收益能够匹配炒作。即将发布的第四季度财报将详细说明数据中心扩展的进展和AI战略的财务影响。

title: This proposed federal budget cut could eliminate job training for 42,000 vulnerable seniors
summary: Trump's proposed 2027 budget would cut funding for a job-training program serving 42,000 low-income seniors, just as work requirements for food aid and healthcare coverage become stricter. The cuts could leave vulnerable workers without critical support.
content: A job-training program for low-income older adults is set to lose funding under President Donald Trump’s proposed budget for 2027 — just as more stringent work requirements for food aid and healthcare coverage go into effect.

zh.title: 这项提议的联邦预算削减可能会消除42,000名弱势老年人的工作培训
zh.summary: 特朗普提议的2027年预算将削减为42,000名低收入老年人服务的工作培训项目的资金，同时食品援助和医疗覆盖的工作要求变得更严格。这些削减可能会使弱势工人失去关键支持。

title: Super Micro stock plunges as $7 billion equity raise overshadows booming backlog
summary: Super Micro Computer announced a $7 billion equity raise amid massive AI server demand, but investor concerns about cash burn are weighing on sentiment. The company's strong order backlog is being overshadowed by market worries about its financing needs. This reflects the capital-intensive nature of AI infrastructure expansion.
content: Super Micro looks to raise equity as it faces staggering AI demand but also an intense cash burn

zh.title: 超微计算机股价暴跌，70亿美元融资掩盖了蓬勃的订单积压
zh.summary: 超微计算机公司在大规模人工智能服务器需求中宣布了70亿美元融资，但投资者对现金流出的担忧正在影响市场情绪。该公司强劲的订单积压被市场对其融资需求的担忧所掩盖。这反映了人工智能基础设施扩张的资本密集性。

title: Republican Steve Hilton advances to general election in race for California governor
summary: Republican Steve Hilton has qualified for California's gubernatorial general election, positioning himself against the state's Democratic establishment. His campaign emphasizes the need for new leadership after 15+ years of Democratic control. This marks a significant moment in the state's 2026 political cycle.
content: Republican Steve Hilton has advanced to the general election for California governor after making the case that the state desperately needs new leadership following more than 15 years of Democratic dominance.

zh.title: 共和党人史蒂夫·希尔顿晋级加州州长大选
zh.summary: 共和党人史蒂夫·希尔顿已获得加州州长大选的参选资格，将自己与该州民主党建制派相对立。他的竞选强调在民主党控制15年以上后需要新的领导力。这标志着该州2026年政治周期中的一个重要时刻。
